versions.version_description: It sounds like the base of the song once you've removed Zach's fancy picking, but it's also a simple version that could be good for beginning guitar players to learn.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
PINK SKIES
As recorded by Zach Bryan
(2024 release)


Capo 5th fret.

If you don't want to use a capo transpose +5 steps.

[ch]Csus2[/ch]  x300xx


[Intro]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
So pack the car and dry your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I know they got plenty of young blood left in 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
And plenty nights under pink skies[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
You taught 'em to enjoy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
So clean the house, clear the drawers[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Mop the floors, stand tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
Like no one's ever been here[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Before or at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
And don't you mention all the inches[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]
That are scraped on the doorframe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
We all know you tiptoed[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Csus2[/ch]
Up to 4'1 back in '08[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppiеs[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I bet God hеard you coming[/tab]


[Harmonica Solo]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 And the grass all smells the same as the day you broke your arm swinging[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 On that kid out on the river[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
You bailed them out, never said a thing[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
About Jesus or the way he's livin'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppies[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
I bet God heard you comin'[/tab]


[Harmonica Solo]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppiеs[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]            ([ch]C[/ch])
I bet God hеard you coming[/tab]


[Harmonica Solo]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
So pack the car and dry your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I know they got plenty of young blood left in 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
And plenty nights under pink skies[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
You taught 'em to enjoy[/tab]
